comment: What happened to the feature that allowed displaying the translation in big text (esp. Chinese) when you rotated the phone to landscape? I read the other reviews and I see that the new design doesn't have a lot of things. I suspect it's now about being more profitable than functional?
key sentence: the feature that allowed displaying the translation in big text when you rotated the phone to landscape
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
